_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-002 (AI, cosine: 0.525), RM-T-008 (RM, cosine: 0.524).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.605). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [activities, description, design, development, documented, ensure] vs WIDAI-only terms [articles, base, data, develop, documentation, escalation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.867, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a fu" and "Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including stand" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.590 ≈ STS 0.605 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.9%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [activities, description, design, development, documented, ensure]. WIDAI terms: [articles, base, data, develop, documentation, escalation].
